title: Analysis code for: Auditable return governance for germline secondary findings in tumor-normal genome sequencing: A single-institution Japan WGS Program audit
description: De-identified analysis and visualization scripts accompanying a single-institution implementation audit of germline secondary findings (SFs) in tumor-normal whole-genome sequencing within the Japan WGS Program. The repository contains four pipelines: (1) SNV/indel pathogenic / likely-pathogenic extraction from ANNOVAR/InterVar/ClinVar annotations; (2) CNV calling (CNVkit) with AnnotSV ACMG class 4/5 prioritization; (3) pharmacogenomics with PharmCAT; and (4) genetic-ancestry inference by gnomAD v3.1 PCA projection. No participant-level data are included; all file-system paths are de-identified placeholders. See README for inputs, outputs, and dependency versions.
